title: Arteta: Arsenal must be 'ambitious' after final lo...
summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has called for the club to be "very ambitious" in summer planning, acknowledging PSG's quality after their Champions League final loss. The comments reflect on Arsenal's need to strengthen after falling short in Europe.
content: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal to be "very ambitious" this summer as he marveled at Paris Saint-Germain's quality in Saturday's Champions League final..

zh.title: 阿尔特塔：阿森纳在决赛后必须"雄心勃勃"
zh.summary: 阿森纳主教练米克尔·阿尔特塔在球队在欧冠决赛中不敌巴黎圣日耳曼后，呼吁俱乐部在夏季转会中要"非常雄心勃勃"。这些言论反映了阿森纳在欧洲赛场失利后加强阵容的必要性。

title: Pulisic unfazed by scoreless slump ahead of WC
summary: Christian Pulisic is experiencing a career-worst goal drought but remains confident he will score at the World Cup. Despite the extended scoreless streak, the American forward expresses belief in his ability to deliver when it matters.
content: - In a career-worst scoreless slump, Christian Pulisic is confident goals will come for him at the World Cup.

zh.title: 普利西奇对世界杯前的进球荒不为所动
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂安·普利西奇虽然正经历职业生涯最严重的进球荒，但仍对自己在世界杯上的表现充满信心。尽管长期没有进球，这位美国前锋相信自己在关键时刻能够挺身而出。

title: Reports: Sterling arrested; suspected drug driving...
summary: Raheem Sterling was arrested Thursday morning on suspicion of driving while unfit through drugs, according to reports. The incident represents a significant situation for the professional footballer.
content: Raheem Sterling was arrested on Thursday morning on suspicion of driving "whilst unfit through drugs," according to reports.

zh.title: 报道：斯特林被逮捕；涉嫌药物驾驶
zh.summary: 据报道，拉赫姆·斯特林周四上午因涉嫌在药物影响下驾驶而被逮捕。这一事件对这位职业足球运动员来说是一个重大情况。

title: Ream named USMNT captain for 2026 World Cup
summary: USMNT manager Mauricio Pochettino has named defender Tim Ream as captain for the 2026 World Cup. Ream will lead the American squad as they compete in the tournament.
content: U.S. men's national team manager Mauricio Pochettino has named defender Tim Ream as captain for the USMNT during the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 里姆被任命为2026年世界杯美国足球队队长
zh.summary: 美国足球队主教练毛里西奥·波切蒂诺任命后卫蒂姆·里姆为2026年世界杯队长。里姆将在比赛中领导美国队参加这项赛事。

title: Police detain 45 as violence mars PSG celebrations...
summary: Paris police detained 45 people after violence disrupted celebrations of PSG's second consecutive Champions League title on Saturday. The disturbances included an attempt to storm a police station in the French capital.
content: Paris police detained 45 people after violence disrupted celebrations late Saturday of Paris Saint-Germain's second Champions League title win and a group tried to storm a police station in the French capital.

zh.title: 警察拘留45人，暴力破坏巴黎圣日耳曼庆祝活动
zh.summary: 巴黎警察在周六暴力事件破坏了巴黎圣日耳曼连续第二次欧冠冠军庆祝活动后，拘留了45人。骚乱包括试图冲击法国首都的一个警察局。

title: 🤔 Why is USMNT playing right before World Cup?
summary: The USMNT will play two friendlies before the 2026 World Cup, raising questions about the strategic value of meaningless matches during their busy summer. Critics question whether the games provide benefit ahead of the tournament.
content: Before the USMNT starts the World Cup, the Americans will play two friendlies: Why add meaningless games to their busy summer?

zh.title: 🤔 美国足球队为什么在世界杯前夕比赛？
zh.summary: 美国足球队将在2026年世界杯前进行两场友谊赛，这引发了人们对他们繁忙夏季中无意义比赛战略价值的疑问。批评人士质疑这些比赛是否能在赛事前为球队带来好处。

title: Copy of PSG beat Arsenal in shootout to retain UCL title
summary: Paris Saint-Germain won back-to-back Champions League titles by rallying to defeat Arsenal in a penalty shootout in Budapest on Saturday. PSG became only the second team in history to achieve consecutive Champions League victories.
content: Paris Saint-Germain became just the second team to win back-to-back Champions League titles after rallying to beat Arsenal following a penalty shootout in Budapest, Hungary, on Saturday.

zh.title: 巴黎圣日耳曼在点球大战中击败阿森纳卫冕欧冠冠军
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼在周六布达佩斯的点球大战中逆转战胜阿森纳，赢得欧冠连冠。巴黎圣日耳曼成为历史上仅有的第二支连续赢得欧冠冠军的球队。

title: Iraola the frontrunner to become Liverpool boss
summary: Andoni Iraola has emerged as the leading candidate to become Liverpool's next head coach, succeeding Arne Slot, according to ESPN sources. Iraola is the frontrunner in the club's managerial search.
content: Andoni Iraola is the leading candidate to succeed Arne Slot as Liverpool head coach, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 伊拉奥拉成为利物浦主帅热门人选
zh.summary: 据ESPN消息来源，安东尼·伊拉奥拉已成为利物浦下任主帅的主要候选人，将接替阿恩·斯洛特。伊拉奥拉是俱乐部主帅搜寻中的热门人选。

title: Ancelotti: No regrets selecting injured Neymar
summary: Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti stated he has no plans to replace Neymar in his World Cup squad despite the forward's calf injury. Ancelotti said he would not have made a different selection decision even knowing the extent of Neymar's injury beforehand.
content: Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti said on Saturday he has no plans to replace Neymar in his World Cup squad and brushed off questions about whether he would have selected the forward had he know the extent of his calf injury.

zh.title: 安切洛蒂：选择受伤的内马尔无悔
zh.summary: 巴西主教练卡洛·安切洛蒂表示，尽管前锋内马尔小腿受伤，他没有计划更换世界杯阵容中的内马尔。安切洛蒂说，即使事先知道内马尔的伤势程度，他也不会改变选择决定。

title: What's happened in soccer since the 2022 World Cup...
summary: For viewers returning to the World Cup after missing coverage since Qatar 2022, significant changes have occurred in soccer. The article provides context on major developments in the sport over the past four years.
content: If you're readying to tune back into the World Cup but haven't watched much since Qatar 2022, what have you missed? Quite a lot, actually.

zh.title: 自2022年世界杯以来足球界发生了什么
zh.summary: 对于自卡塔尔2022年以来错过世界杯报道的观众来说，足球界已发生了重大变化。该文章提供了过去四年来该运动的主要发展背景。

title: How the World Cup's 'least-known' player became a ...
summary: New Zealand's Tim Payne was the World Cup's least-known player until a social media personality brought attention to him. The story highlights how social media can elevate previously obscure athletes to prominence.
content: The World Cup's least-known player was New Zealand's Tim Payne, until a social media personality changed that.

zh.title: 世界杯"最不为人知"的球员是如何成名的
zh.summary: 新西兰球员蒂姆·佩恩是世界杯上最不为人知的球员，直到一位社交媒体名人为他吸引了关注。这个故事强调了社交媒体如何能将以前籍籍无名的运动员推向名人地位。

title: How PSG bested Arsenal to win UEFA Champions Leagu...
summary: Paris Saint-Germain won the UEFA Champions League title for the second consecutive year by defeating Arsenal. PSG's back-to-back victories represent a dominant run in European competition.
content: Paris Saint-Germain are your UEFA Champions League winners for the second year in a row.

zh.title: 巴黎圣日耳曼如何击败阿森纳赢得欧洲冠军联赛
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼通过击败阿森纳连续第二年赢得欧洲冠军联赛冠军。PSG的背靠背胜利代表了欧洲竞争中的统治地位。

title: VAR review: UCL ref got the Mendes-Madueke call ri...
summary: A VAR review of Saturday's Champions League final examines controversial decisions, including official review of Nuno Mendes' challenge on Noni Madueke. Analyst Andy Davies breaks down the controversial calls from the match.
content: There were a number of controversial decisions made in Saturday's UCL final. Andy Davies breaks down each of the calls, including Nuno Mendes' challenge on Noni Madueke.

zh.title: VAR审查:欧冠裁判对门德斯-马杜埃克犯规判罚正确
zh.summary: 这是对周六欧冠决赛的VAR审查,审视争议判罚,包括对努诺·门德斯对诺尼·马杜埃克防守的正式审查。分析师安迪·戴维斯详细分析了比赛中的争议判罚。
